title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google introduced Gemma-4 12B, a local multimodal model optimized for agentic workflows on consumer laptops with 16GB VRAM. The model features a unified encoder-free multimodal architecture, multi-token prediction for latency reduction, and integrates with deployment frameworks including LiteRT-LM, Ollama, and AI Edge Gallery.
